name: revtown-g2-monitor
description: G2 review sentiment analysis plugin for RevTown Intelligence Station
author: RevTown Team

polecats.name: G2ReviewAnalyzer
polecats.description: Analyze G2 reviews for sentiment, trends, and competitive insights

polecats.name: G2CompetitorCompare
polecats.description: Compare G2 ratings and reviews with competitors

refinery_checks.name: g2_rating_verification
refinery_checks.description: Verify G2 ratings and statistics cited in content are accurate

refinery_checks.name: g2_badge_compliance
refinery_checks.description: Verify G2 badge usage follows G2's brand guidelines

review_limit.description: Maximum reviews to analyze per run

sentiment_threshold.description: Minimum sentiment score to flag as positive

competitor_products.description: G2 product slugs for competitors to monitor

alert_on_negative.description: Send alerts for negative review trends
